title: WHAT WE DO.
hero.intro: Custom development. Systems engineering. Design to deployment.

cta.title: READY WHEN IT NEEDS TO SHIP.

cards.title: CUSTOM DEVELOPMENT
cards.description: We build what you need. Custom products, internal tools, platform work. Whatever the problem demands.

cards.title: SYSTEMS ENGINEERING
cards.description: Infrastructure, pipelines, integrations. Things that need to run and stay running.

cards.title: DESIGN TO DEPLOYMENT
cards.description: Concept to live. We handle strategy, design, build, and launch. One team, start to finish.

sections.title: DOMAINS.
sections.body: We've worked across prediction systems, voice platforms, industrial tools, and other areas. Past work stays under NDA — talk to us if you're working in one of these areas.

sections.title: PRODUCTS.
sections.body: We've also shipped standalone products — ORACLE, OUTBOUND, SHADOW. Each one has its own page.
